subcodes.first_line: In the Name of God, the victor of the most victorious, proclaim: God will assist all those who arise to serve Him. No one is able to deprive Him of His majesty, His dominion, His sovereignty, for in the heaven and the earth and in all the realms of God He is the victorious and the conqueror!
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
